diagnostic_basis: acute rise in creatinine or reduced urine output
agent_use: 用于识别肾功能受损和需肾调整药物风险

diagnostic_basis: persistent reduction in kidney function or kidney damage markers
agent_use: 用于识别慢性肾病背景和肾排泄药物复核

diagnostic_basis: urinary symptoms plus urinalysis or culture evidence
reference_source: IDSA urinary tract infection guidance; MedlinePlus
agent_use: 用于识别泌尿感染诊断依据和抗感染治疗背景

diagnostic_basis: serum electrolyte values outside clinically safe range
agent_use: 用于识别电解质风险和用药安全复核

diagnostic_basis: flank pain or hematuria with stone evidence on imaging
reference_source: AUA kidney stone guidance; Merck Manual
agent_use: 用于识别结石疼痛感染和肾功能风险

diagnostic_basis: hematuria proteinuria or reduced kidney function with glomerular pattern
reference_source: KDIGO glomerular diseases guideline; Merck Manual
agent_use: 用于识别免疫相关肾病和肾毒性治疗复核

diagnostic_basis: inability to void or high post void residual with lower urinary tract symptoms
agent_use: 用于识别尿潴留和抗胆碱镇静药物风险

diagnostic_basis: severe renal dysfunction with refractory electrolyte acid base volume or uremic complications
agent_use: 用于识别透析相关风险和药物剂量复核
